title: An Exceptional Episode
overview: The shooting war is over. The undefeated Soyokaze has returned home and all should be right in the universe. It's not ... the Raalgon Empire has created an incredibly powerful and destabilizing new weapon system. With the urging of the Prime Minister, they're about to deploy it and when the UPSF forces realize this the choice is clear. These are desperate times ...

title: An Exception Episode (Part 2)
overview: The shooting war is over. The undefeated Soyokaze has returned home and all should be right in the universe. It's not ... the Raalgon Empire has created an incredibly powerful and destabilizing new weapon system. With the urging of the Prime Minister, they're about to deploy it and when the UPSF forces realize this the choice is clear. These are desperate times ..

title: The Rules of Being 16
overview: Azalyn travels to the world of Ashran, which was conqured by her father. There she meets with an old childhood friend, Ruu, who has lost his memory, so she tries to help him remember.

title: The Samurai's Narrow Escape
overview: Kojiro begins testing a new type of fighter. While testing occurs he runs into trouble when he flies towards a wrecked ship.

title: The High-Tech Opposition
overview: The marines are keen to try out a new weapon but have to pass an exam before they are allowed to use it. Andresen however is concerned due to his knowledge of the designer, which are proved true when the new weapon goes haywire.

title: White Christmas
overview: It is Christmas Eve, and Tylor has agreed to meet up with Yuriko. However, on the way to meeting her Tylor keeps getting distracted by a young boy who is following him.

title: If Only the Skies Would Clear (Part 1)
overview: Yamamoto is made captain of his own ship, but soon finds himself demoted after he gets attacked. Meanwhile Yuriko is kidnapped by Raaglon spies working for Wang, who wants to start the war again.

title: If Only The Skies Would Clear (Part 2)
overview: Yamamoto is made captain of his own ship, but soon finds himself demoted after he gets attacked. Meanwhile Yuriko is kidnapped by Raaglon spies working for Wang, who wants to start the war again.

title: From Here To Eternity (Part 1)
overview: All the pieces of the puzzle begin to fall into place. It appears that the war is going to restart, but it is all being controlled by a third party behind the scenes. Can Tylor or his former crew mates find the solution in time?

title: From Here To Eternity (Part 2)
overview: All the pieces of the puzzle begin to fall into place. It appears that the war is going to restart, but it is all being controlled by a third party behind the scenes. Can Tylor or his former crew mates find the solution in time?
